description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a polished brass base and a green marbled glass shade. The lamp has a sturdy, round, tiered base with a central column that supports the shade via two curved brass arms. The green glass shade is cylindrical with a marbled pattern and is held horizontally above the base, providing a distinctive vintage look. A small pull chain hangs from beneath the shade, serving as the lamp’s switch. The brass components are highly reflective and smooth, contributing to the lamp’s elegant and traditional appearance. This type of lamp is commonly found on desks in libraries, offices, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A vintage banker’s lamp with a polished brass base and a green marbled glass shade, featuring a pull chain switch and elegant, reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green marbled glass shade, brass base, and the pull chain hanging visibly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved brass arm supporting the shade and the cylindrical shape of the glass.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical brass arms and the back of the marbled glass shade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brass arm and the pull chain from a different angle.
